text:
Moving mouse or some other action's (I'm not sure which one cause the problem also, but with mouse is sure) while playing sound give error message: /kernel: pcm0: hwptr went backwards 2112 -> 1312. It doesn't matter if I use SMP kernel or not

Fix: 

Don't know.
How-To-Repeat: 
Play music on your soundcard and move mouse
